ops.text: Workflow tool args arrived JSON-stringified when launching skills/getaway/plan-trip.js via scriptPath — twice, reproducibly — so 'const a = args' saw a string and validation threw 'script must be an absolute path'. Pre-hybrid invocations of the same script worked in past sessions, so this looks like a harness regression, not a product bug; live test needed a one-line JSON.parse shim in a scratch copy.
